items.title: Spatial multiomic atlas of colorectal tumor microenvironment
items.summary: PI: Jane Okafor. Institution: Dana-Farber Cancer Institute. Award: $412,000.
items.why: Newly funded spatial tumor lab at Dana-Farber. PI may need probes soon.

items.title: Molecular Instruments expands HCR RNA-CISH availability
items.summary: New kit positioned against RNAscope on speed and price.
items.why: Most direct RNAscope competitor expanding. Prep counter-positioning now.

items.title: RNAscope validation of spatial transcriptomics in fibrotic lung
items.summary: Nature Communications. RNAscope used as orthogonal validation.
items.why: High-profile RNAscope validation paper. Strong proof point.

items.title: Newly funded MERFISH neural atlas project
items.summary: PI: R. Chen. Institution: Johns Hopkins University. Award: $530,000.
items.why: Funded multiplexed imaging lab at Johns Hopkins. Active spatial buyer.
